sizing_rule.note: Use optimal f sizing and let the fraction approach 1.0 as account equity grows. Avoid frequent reallocation; maintain position sizing discipline across growth cycles without daily/trade-by-trade readjustment.

source_rule_text: Avoid frequent reallocation of position sizing; ideally never reallocate, and let the fraction of optimal f approach 1 as account equity grows rather than reallocating after every trade or daily.
